title: StatsReader
description: StatsReader shows BedWars player stats directly in the TAB list on GommeHD.net using a community-updated database that syncs via /stats.
body:
# StatsReader
## See who you're up against — instantly.
StatsReader brings BedWars player stats directly into your TAB list on GommeHD.net, so you can identify strong players without manually checking every /stats.
Player data is sourced from a public community database. Whenever a StatsReader user runs /stats, the latest statistics are automatically uploaded and shared with all users, keeping the database continuously up to date.
Configure which stats are shown using /statsreader
### Public Database: https://bedwarsdatabase.at
## Features
- Live BedWars stats in TAB list
- Community-powered database
- Automatic updates via /stats
- Customizable
## Compatibility
Fabric (requires Fabric Loader + Fabric API)
Works with modern clients and launchers including Lunar Client, NoRisk Client and Modrinth
Designed for GommeHD.net BedWars
